# zod

<!-- archie:ai-start -->

> Auto-generated Zod validation schemas for all OpenMeter API query parameters and request bodies, produced by orval from the OpenAPI spec. Exports typed Zod objects and constant defaults/regex patterns per operation — never hand-edit this file.

## Patterns

**Generated by orval — do not edit** — index.ts carries the 'Generated by orval v8.7.0 — Do not edit manually.' header. All schemas are regenerated from the OpenAPI spec. Any manual edit will be overwritten on the next make gen-api. (`/**
 * Generated by orval v8.7.0 🍺
 * Do not edit manually.
 */`)
**Constants exported before each Zod schema** — Each operation exports named constants for defaults, min/max values, and RegExp patterns before the Zod schema object (e.g. listAddonsQueryPageDefault = 1, listAddonsQueryKeyItemRegExp). These constants are referenced inside the zod.object() calls. (`export const listAddonsQueryPageDefault = 1
export const listAddonsQueryPageSizeMax = 1000
export const ListAddonsQueryParams = zod.object({
  page: zod.coerce.number().min(1).default(listAddonsQueryPageDefault),
  pageSize: zod.coerce.number().min(1).max(listAddonsQueryPageSizeMax).default(listAddonsQueryPageSizeDefault)
})`)
**zod.coerce for all scalar fields** — Query parameters use zod.coerce.string(), zod.coerce.number(), zod.coerce.boolean() to handle URL string coercion automatically. This matches how form-encoded query strings arrive in validated contexts. (`includeDeleted: zod.coerce.boolean().default(listAddonsQueryIncludeDeletedDefault)`)

## Key Files

| File | Role | Watch For |
|------|------|-----------|
| `index.ts` | Single generated file exporting all Zod schemas for API query param and body validation. Exports both the constants (defaults, regexps, min/max) and the Zod schema objects per operation. | DO NOT EDIT. Import and use these schemas for server-side validation of incoming query parameters. The naming convention is <OperationPascalCase>QueryParams or <OperationPascalCase>Body. |

## Anti-Patterns

- Manually editing index.ts — it is regenerated by orval from the OpenAPI spec on make gen-api
- Redefining Zod schemas locally when the generated schemas already cover the operation
- Using the raw generated constants (defaults/regexps) in application logic — they are implementation details of the schema and subject to regeneration

## Decisions

- **Zod schemas generated by orval from the same OpenAPI spec that generates TypeScript types** — Keeps runtime validation (Zod) and compile-time types (TypeScript) in sync with the TypeSpec source of truth. Single make gen-api updates both.

<!-- archie:ai-end -->
